    "creditsUsed": 5,
    "concurrencyLimited": false
  },
  "json": {
    "release": {
      "library": "React",
      "version": "19.2",
      "date": "October 1, 2025",
      "summary": "React 19.2 introduces new features such as `<Activity />`, `useEffectEvent`, `cacheSignal`, and performance improvements, along with enhancements for server-side rendering and notable behavioral changes."
    },
    "apiChanges": [
      {
        "apiName": "<Activity />",
        "category": "New Feature",
        "whatChanged": "Introduces a new component that allows prioritization and control over sections of the app based on visibility.",
        "example": "<Activity mode={isVisible ? 'visible' : 'hidden'}><Page /></Activity>",
        "sourceSection": "New React Features"
      },
      {
        "apiName": "useEffectEvent",
        "category": "New Hook",
        "whatChanged": "Allows separating event logic from `useEffect`, avoiding unnecessary re-executions when non-related dependencies change.",
        "example": "const onConnected = useEffectEvent(() => { showNotification('Connected!', theme); });",
        "sourceSection": "New React Features"
      },
      {
        "apiName": "cacheSignal",
        "category": "New API",
        "whatChanged": "Introduces a signaling mechanism for cache lifetime management within React Server Components.",
        "example": "await dedupedFetch(url, { signal: cacheSignal() });",
        "sourceSection": "New React Features"
      },
      {
        "apiName": "Partial Pre-rendering",
        "category": "New React DOM Feature",
        "whatChanged": "Adds capability to pre-render parts of the app ahead of time, improving load times while enabling later resumption of rendering.",
        "example": "const { prelude, postponed } = await prerender(<App />, { signal: controller.signal });",
        "sourceSection": "New React DOM Features"
      }
    ]
  }
}
